name: Rusty Shortsword
description: A dull blade with flecks of rust. Better than bare fists.

name: Minor Health Potion
description: A small vial of red liquid. Restores a bit of health.

name: Spore-Crusted Dagger
description: A short blade with a faintly glowing fungal growth along the edge.

name: Lurker Fang Blade
description: A jagged blade fashioned from a Cave Lurker's oversized fang.

name: Sporecap War Hammer
description: A massive hammer made from a petrified mushroom stalk. Slow but devastating.

name: Staff of the Deep Mycelium
description: A twisted staff of living fungal matter. It pulses with a warm, healing light.

name: Blade of the Mycelium King
description: A sword formed from the King's own tendrils. It writhes in your grip.

name: Fungal Buckler
description: A small shield grown from hardened mushroom caps. Surprisingly tough.

name: Bioluminescent Orb
description: A glass sphere containing living fungi. Pulses with a soothing glow.

name: Fungal Fiber Wrap
description: A crude wrapping of woven fungal fibers. Offers minimal protection.

name: Lurker-Skin Cloak
description: A cloak made from pale lurker hide. Light and easy to move in.

name: Rusted Chain Vest
description: Ancient chainmail found deep in the caves. Still holds together.

name: Sporecap Plate Armor
description: Armor crafted from petrified mushroom caps. Heavy but incredibly durable.

name: Bone Charm Amulet
description: A necklace of small bones that rattles faintly. You feel tougher wearing it.

name: Ring of Vitality
description: A moss-covered ring that pulses with life energy.

name: Crown of the Mycelium King
description: A living crown of fungal tendrils. It whispers secrets of the deep.

name: Spore Heart
description: A pulsing organ from the Mycelium King. Warm to the touch.

name: Leather Scrap Bandage
description: Makeshift bandages from old leather. Not great, but better than bleeding.

name: Health Potion
description: A standard healing draught. Tastes like mushroom soup.

name: Greater Health Potion
description: A large flask of potent healing liquid. Glows faintly.

name: Fungal Elixir
description: A shimmering elixir distilled from rare bioluminescent fungi.

name: Volatile Spore Pod
description: A bulging spore pod that explodes on impact. Handle with care.

name: Crystal Shard Blade
description: A crude weapon fashioned from a broken crystal. Sharp but fragile.

name: Prismatic Rapier
description: A slender blade of translucent crystal that splits light into rainbows as it moves.

name: Geode Maul
description: A massive crystalline growth on a stone handle. The hollow interior rings when it strikes.

name: Resonance Blade
description: A sword of pure crystal that hums at a frequency that makes your teeth ache. Devastating to crystalline foes.

name: Crystal Buckler
description: A small shield cut from a single amethyst formation. Light refracts off its surface.

name: Prismatic Focus
description: A multifaceted crystal held in a wire frame. It concentrates ambient light into a warm glow.

name: Crystal Lattice Mail
description: Interlocking crystal plates that chime softly with each step.

name: Geode Plate Armor
description: Thick armor carved from the walls of enormous geodes. Beautiful and resilient.

name: Refraction Pendant
description: A crystal pendant that bends light around the wearer. Harder to hit than you'd expect.

name: Heart of the Geode
description: A perfect sphere of living crystal, warm and pulsing. Found only in the deepest formations.

name: Crushed Crystal Dust
description: A handful of finely ground crystal. When inhaled, it sharpens the senses painfully.

name: Prismatic Flask
description: A potion that shimmers with every color. Restores body and mind.

name: Shatter Bomb
description: A fragile crystal sphere packed with pressurized shards. Explodes violently on impact.

name: Corroded Cutlass
description: A sailor's blade claimed by the depths. Still cuts, though it smells terrible.

name: Barbed Harpoon
description: A cruel harpoon with backward-facing barbs. Designed to hook flesh and hold.

name: Trident of the Deep
description: A three-pronged spear encrusted with barnacles. The tines glow faintly beneath the water.

name: Leviathan Tooth
description: A massive fang pulled from something that should not exist. Heavier than stone.

name: Driftwood Shield
description: A shield cobbled from waterlogged planks. It floats, which is sometimes useful.

name: Shell Aegis
description: A shield fashioned from a giant nautilus shell. Impossibly hard.

name: Woven Kelp Wrap
description: Layers of dried kelp bound tightly. Smells of the sea but turns blades surprisingly well.

name: Barnacle Mail
description: Armor covered in calcified barnacles. Each hit chips off a few, but there are always more.

name: Abyssal Plate
description: Armor forged from materials found only in the deepest trenches. Cold to the touch.

name: Black Pearl Earring
description: A single black pearl on a corroded hook. It seems to drink the light around it.

name: Tidecaller Ring
description: A ring of polished coral that is always wet. The water rises and falls with your heartbeat.

name: Eye of the Leviathan
description: A preserved eye the size of your fist. It still moves, tracking things you cannot see.

name: Brine Tonic
description: A concentrated salt solution that stings going down but closes wounds fast.

name: Sea Foam Salve
description: A thick paste of crushed shells and sea foam. Numbs pain on contact.

name: Depth Charge
description: A sealed bladder of compressed gas from the deep. Detonates with concussive force.

name: Sharpened Femur
description: A large bone sharpened to a wicked point. Crude but effective.

name: Ribcage Flail
description: A spine segment with a ribcage swinging from a chain of vertebrae. Horrific and effective.

name: Skull Crusher Mace
description: A mace topped with a petrified giant skull. It grins as you swing it.

name: Death Rattle Scythe
description: A scythe assembled from countless small bones. It sings a rattling dirge when swung.

name: Skull Cap Shield
description: Half a giant's skull, repurposed. The empty eye socket stares at your enemies.

name: Ossuary Lantern
description: A lantern made from a skull with pale fire burning inside. It illuminates things better left unseen.

name: Bone Weave Armor
description: Overlapping bones stitched with sinew. Rattles with every step.

name: Ossified Carapace
description: A full suit of fused bone. It feels alive, growing warmer the longer you wear it.

name: Finger Bone Ring
description: A ring carved from a single knuckle bone. It twitches occasionally.

name: Vertebrae Necklace
description: A necklace of small vertebrae that clicks and shifts on its own.

name: Death Shroud Amulet
description: An amulet containing a fragment of something that was once alive and refuses to stop. Wreathed in pale mist.

name: Marrow Paste
description: A thick paste extracted from ancient bones. Smells awful, heals well.

name: Spirit Draught
description: A ghostly liquid in a bone vial. It evaporates as you drink it, but the healing is real.

name: Bone Shard Bomb
description: A hollowed skull packed with razor-sharp bone fragments. Gruesome but effective.

name: Slag Cleaver
description: A blade of cooled slag with an edge that glows faintly orange. Burns what it cuts.

name: Obsidian Edge
description: A sword of volcanic glass, impossibly sharp. Handle with extreme care.

name: Magma-Forged Axe
description: An axe forged in flowing lava. The blade still radiates heat and glows at the edge.

name: Inferno Greatsword
description: A massive blade wreathed in perpetual flame. The hilt is uncomfortably warm.

name: Basalt Bulwark
description: A thick slab of basalt carved into a shield. Incredibly heavy but nearly indestructible.

name: Ember Ward
description: A shield of blackened iron that absorbs flame. Embers dance across its surface.

name: Cinder Mail
description: Chainmail forged from volcanic iron. Warm to the touch and smells of sulfur.

name: Volcanic Plate Armor
description: Plates of cooled lava hammered into shape. Cracks glow orange when struck.

name: Magma Core Armor
description: Armor with veins of molten rock running through it. The heat cauterizes wounds on contact.

name: Ember Band
description: A ring of blackened iron with a tiny eternal flame inside. Warm and comforting.

name: Cinderstone Pendant
description: A pendant containing a stone that never stops smoldering. The heat is strangely invigorating.

name: Heart of the Forge
description: A fragment of the primordial forge that burns at the world's core. It reshapes the wielder.

name: Magma Salve
description: A paste that burns, then heals. The process is agonizing but effective.

name: Volcanic Tonic
description: A bubbling red liquid that tastes like liquid fire. Restores vigor rapidly.

name: Volatile Fire Bomb
description: A clay pot filled with a volatile alchemical mixture. Shatters into a ball of flame.

name: Superior Elixir
description: A masterfully brewed potion of extraordinary potency. Shimmers with golden light.

name: Iron Dagger
description: A short blade of hammered iron. Cheap, common, and gets the job done.

name: Wooden Club
description: A heavy length of hardwood, splintered at one end. Simple but brutal.

name: Wooden Shield
description: A round shield of rough-cut planks bound with iron bands. Dented but functional.

name: Padded Cloth Armor
description: Layers of quilted cloth stuffed with wool. Barely qualifies as armor.

name: Scavenged Leather Vest
description: A patchwork vest of mismatched leather scraps. Smells like a tannery.

name: Rat Fang Necklace
description: A string of yellowed rat fangs. Wearing it feels vaguely disgusting but oddly empowering.

name: Crude Bandage
description: A strip of torn cloth. Better than nothing for stanching a wound.

name: Goblin Shortbow
description: A small bow of bent wood and frayed gut-string. Inaccurate but usable.

name: Miner's Pick
description: A rusted pick left behind by some long-dead prospector. The point is still sharp enough.

name: Tin Buckler
description: A battered buckler of thin tin. Dents easily but deflects just enough.

name: Lucky Rabbit's Foot
description: A dried rabbit's foot on a leather cord. Lucky for you, less so for the rabbit.

name: Chipped Handaxe
description: A small axe with a cracked stone head lashed to a stick. Splits firewood and skulls alike.

name: Rusted Mace
description: A flanged mace covered in orange rust. The weight still does the talking.

name: Bandit's Sabre
description: A curved blade with notches from hard use. Taken from someone who no longer needed it.

name: Plank Shield
description: Two boards nailed together with a leather grip. It will stop exactly one good hit.

name: Hide Tunic
description: A stiff tunic of poorly cured animal hide. Reeks, but absorbs punishment.

name: Iron Chain Scraps
description: Loose rings of iron chain sewn onto a cloth backing. Improvised but functional.

name: Spider Fang Pendant
description: A venom-stained fang on a cord of spider silk. It throbs with a faint, toxic warmth.

name: Tarnished Locket
description: A dented silver locket with the portrait inside worn smooth. Holding it steadies your nerves.

name: Cave Moss Poultice
description: A wad of damp cave moss packed with healing herbs. Apply directly to wounds.

name: Rot-Gut Flask
description: A dented tin flask of foul homebrew. Numbs everything, including the pain.
